rd_changelog.description: Opens the RetroDECK change log in your default browser
rd_changelog.name: Changelog

rd_contactus.description: Opens the RetroDECK contact us section in your default browser
rd_contactus.name: Contact us

rd_credits.description: Opens the RetroDECK Credits in your default browser
rd_credits.name: Credits

rd_donate.description: Opens Donations page in your default browser
rd_donate.name: Donate

rd_licenses.description: Opens the RetroDECK licenses in your default browser
rd_licenses.name: Licences

rd_web.description: Opens the RetroDECK Website in your default browser
rd_web.name: Website

rd_wiki.description: Opens the RetroDECK Wiki in your default browser
rd_wiki.name: Wiki

ask_to_exit.name: Ask-To-Exit
ask_to_exit.desc: Enable or disable: Show a confirmation pop-up when exiting a game (for certain components).

borders.name: Borders
borders.desc: Enable or disable: Borders/Bezels in supported components.

discord_rich_presence.name: Discord Rich Presence
discord_rich_presence.desc: Enable or disable: Discord Rich Presence in supported components.

cheevos.name: RetroAchievements
cheevos.desc: Logging in/out of RetroAchievements in supported components.

cheevos_hardcore.name: RetroAchievements: Hardcore Mode
cheevos_hardcore.desc: Enable or disable: Hardcore mode for RetroAchievements (no cheats, rewind, or save states) in supported components.

quick_resume.name: Quick Resume
quick_resume.desc: Enable or disable: Automatic save/load of game states in supported components.

rewind.name: Rewind
rewind.desc: Enable or disable: Rewind functionality in supported components.

savestate_auto_load.name: Savestate Auto Load
savestate_auto_load.desc: Enable or disable: Automatic load of the last saved state in supported components.

savestate_on_exit.name: Savestate on Exit
savestate_on_exit.desc: Enable or disable: Automatic save on exit in supported components.

abxy_button_swap.name: Swap A/B and X/Y Buttons
abxy_button_swap.desc: Enable or disable: Swapped A/B and X/Y button layout in supported components.

universal_dyn_input.name: Universal Dynamic Input Textures
universal_dyn_input.desc: Enable or disable: Universal Dynamic Input Textures in supported components.

widescreen.name: Widescreen
widescreen.desc: Enable or disable: Widescreen mode in supported components.
